message:
feat(service): add SearchHandler and SchedulerRuntime abstractions

Add decoupled search execution and scheduler state management abstractions to enable
testing and progressive system integration without tight coupling.

Changes:
- Add search_handler.rs: SearchHandler trait with stub implementation for IPC dispatch
- Add scheduler_runtime.rs: SchedulerRuntime wrapper combining idle/load sampling with job queues
- Update lib.rs: Export new modules and abstractions

Related: c00.6.2 (IPC dispatcher), c00.4.3 (job queues and selection)
